keynotes.text: KEY-NOTES TO THE MATERIA MEDICA by HENRY N. GUERNSEY, M.D. Presented by Médi-T THEA SINENSIS Nervous sleeplessness; heart troubles, etc., of old tea-drinkers, palpitation of the heart, can't lie down. Copyright © Médi-T 2000

Text Book of Materia Medica. By Adolph Lippe, M. D. Professor of Materia Medica at the Homopathic College of Pennsylvania. Presented by Médi-T. Thea sinensis. Stomach and Abdomen. Sensation of complete relaxation of the stomach, with qualmishness and nausea, and discharge of water from the mouth ; her stomach felt as if hanging down like an empty bag, and heavy.
